title: leptostigma reptans
intro: Leptostigma reptans, also known as Kalmegh or Indian Pyrethrum, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Leptostigma reptans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Leptostigma reptans can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
